title: n32x3d_2's Red Glint
description: Changes the glint color to Red.
body:
This Texture Pack changes the enchantment glint color from Purple to Red!

**Requirements:**
    **None**

For people who want to farm more Aura..
works best with insanity Shaders..
**First Person View:**
![Ithis Images Shows The first person view with the texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/547704d28070d14fb095cfcc39588ce9e5dff2ee_0.webp)
**Itemframe and armor stand:**
![Item frame with armor and armor stands with elytra and trimed armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d00896b617e2de7c6af58ff545c657b8cd61029.png)
